results.rendered_html: vīdhra (vīdhra  UṆĀDIS. 2,26 ) adj. = vimala  AK. 3,2,5 .  H. 1436 .  HALĀY. 1,132 . n. = nabhas, vāyu, agni  UṆĀDIVṚ. _im_ SAṂKṢIPTAS.  nach  ŚKDR.  vīdhre bei hellem Himmel (vgl. ведро αἲϑρη): vīdhre sūryamiva sarpantam  AV. 4,20,7 . yadvīdhre stanayati prajāpatiḥ 9,1,24 .  KĀṬH. 13,12 . ˚bindu bei Sonnenschein gefallener Tropfen  KAUŚ. 46 .
